summary: Iteration 77 - Database & Gallery Logic Repair verified. All backend APIs for multi-tiered gallery pricing working correctly. 6/6 pytest tests PASSED.

selfie_url_text_column.details: models.py lines 416 and 718 confirm selfie_url is Column(Text) instead of VARCHAR(500). Both DispatchRequest and LiveSessionParticipant models updated.

gallery_pricing_get_session_pricing.details: GET /api/photographer/{id}/gallery-pricing returns session_pricing object with on_demand_photo_price, live_session_photo_price, live_session_photos_included

gallery_pricing_put_session_pricing.details: PUT /api/photographer/{id}/gallery-pricing updates session pricing fields. Tested update and verified persistence via GET.

gallery_all_photos_excludes_folders.details: GET /api/gallery/photographer/{id} defaults to include_in_folders=False which applies filter GalleryItem.gallery_id == None. Items in folders are excluded from 'All Photos' root.

new_profile_columns.details: Profile model includes on_demand_photo_price (Float, default 10.0), live_session_photo_price (Float, default 5.0), live_session_photos_included (Integer, default 3)

frontend_pricing_integration.details: PricingContext.js and GalleryPage.js correctly fetch/update session_pricing fields from API

critical_code_review_comments: All requested features implemented correctly in backend
models.py: selfie_url changed to Text type for both DispatchRequest (line 416) and LiveSessionParticipant (line 718)
models.py: New session pricing columns added to Profile (lines 131-135)
photographer.py: UpdateGalleryPricingRequest model extended with session pricing fields (lines 278-280)
photographer.py: update_gallery_pricing endpoint updates session pricing (lines 316-321)
gallery.py: get_photographer_gallery has include_in_folders parameter defaulting to False (line 198)
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 5 requested backend features verified PASS: 1) selfie_url is TEXT in models.py, 2) GET gallery-pricing returns session_pricing with new fields, 3) PUT gallery-pricing updates session pricing, 4) Gallery endpoint excludes folder items by default (include_in_folders=False), 5) New pricing columns exist in Profile model. Frontend integration also verified in PricingContext.js and GalleryPage.js.
rca_of_the_issue: No issues found - all features working as intended.
